sources_exist.note: Bootstrap acceptance for the Phase-2 regression fixture; sources carried from the audited v2 prototype run. A real Stage-5 validator run (best model) replaces this record in Phase 4.

figures_match_sources.note: Not independently re-verified — bootstrap. Figures quoted verbatim from the v2 prototype record.

judgment_inputs_plausible.note: pi_dist/pi_moat 0.55 with FAR cost-plus deflation mechanism stated; within-role fractions bounded with rationales. Bootstrap.

rubric_consistent.note: Scores recomputed with template-3.0 formulas at adaptation time; build verifies arithmetic on every run.

cross_checks_honest.note: Uplift, terminal-value (PRESSURED — adaptation judgment, see fixture reviewer_note), no-proxy and pricing-deflation answers carried from the v2 record. Bootstrap.

flags_reviewed: BOOTSTRAP: this is a fixture-bootstrap acceptance created in Phase 2 so the build's acceptance filter is exercised end-to-end; it is not a validator verdict and must be replaced by a real Stage-5 review in Phase 4.
